# Blue Avenue Stitches

> Blue Avenue Garments, Tailoring & Uniforms — Premium uniform supply and professional tailoring in Dubai, UAE.

## About

Blue Avenue Stitches (also known as Blue Avenue Garments, Blue Avenue Tailoring, and Blue Avenue Uniforms) is a leading uniform supplier and professional tailoring company based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We specialise in high-quality stitching and manufacturing of corporate, medical, hospitality, trade, and custom uniforms across the UAE.

## Services

### Corporate
- Suits, Jackets, Aviation wear
- Shirts & Blouse, Trousers, Skirts

### Trade
- Educational, Industrial, Sports
- Promotional, Military uniforms

### Health & Spa
- Health Care uniforms, Scrubs, Tunics
- Trousers & Shorts

### Hospitality
- Restaurant & Hotel/Resort staff uniforms
- Cleaning, House Keeping, Security uniforms

### Custom (Blue Avenue Garments & Tailoring)
- Embroidery, Fabric & Textiles
- Resizing & Alteration, Custom Wear
- Caps & Belts, Winter Jackets
- Flags & National Day Wear
- TShirts & Polo Shirts

### Additional
- Custom Logo Embroidery & Screen Printing
- Bulk Uniform Orders
- Corporate Gifts

## Location

West Zone Supermarket Building, Union Metro Station Exit 2, Dubai, UAE

## Contact

- Phone: 045753696
- Website: https://blueavenuestitches.ae

## Key Facts

- Also searched as: Blue Avenue Garments, Blue Avenue Tailoring, Blue Avenue Uniforms
- Based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Serves the entire UAE
- Standard lead time: 7–14 business days
- Express services available for urgent requirements
- High-precision custom logo embroidery and screen printing
